notes: Fun fact: Greece has more archaeological museums than any other country in the world. Democracy, philosophy, the Olympics, and the gyro. The world owes Greece more than it acknowledges.
highlights: Liked: The Acropolis at sunset is worth the hype. The weight of history is palpable. Athens feels like a city that remembers what it was.
Did not like: August heat is brutal. 40 degrees Celsius with no shade near ancient ruins is a test of character, not tourism.
